events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: orange cable handling violations on HV safety, rough-complete. Orange cables are high-voltage conductors; handling violations likely non-compliant (e.g., improper routing, strain, abrasion, bending radius, contact with sharp edges, not secured, crossing low-voltage without separation). This is fail. Risk high or critical? HV safety violations can cause electrocution, arc flash; on production floor maybe high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 70-85. Need include findings and actions. References: OEM HV procedures, NFPA 70E, maybe OSHA 1910.333, NFPA 70E Article 130, HV cable routing requirements. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose outside JSON.

  ],

Because the installation is defective and non-compliant with a life-safety scope, it fails rough-complete inspection.",
